panel.title: Spotify Player
panel.search_hint: Try searching something to get started.

settings.callback_warning: Ensure this port is not already in use.
settings.tokengen_info: Once you've entered the client ID and client secret, click here to generate an access token for your Spotify account.
settings.devicelist_info: With a valid API token, you can press this button to fetch all of your currently available devices on Spotify.
settings.pid_desc: The ID of the player you want to control.
settings.pid_placeholder: Enter Player ID or leave blank for default...
